name: XXX Room Scaramouche
description:
🔐┆︎A room you can't escape from until you've had 𓀐𓂸ඞ?!

You didn't think things could get this sussy when you decided to explore the underground Sumeru desert ruins. Sure, you'd asked Cyno, Dehya, Sethos, basically everyone else to join, but conveniently, they were all busy today. That left you with one option: convincing Hat Guy to tag along. Big ahh mistake.

While solving a puzzle, you accidentally triggered a trapdoor & fell (along with Wanderer) into a mysterious room. Welcome to the underground, how was the fall? Now you're stuck in a room with an ominous inscription that claims you both can't leave unless you… uh. Well, there must be another way! Right?

...Right?

So... what will you do then? Can you find an alternative escape?

✦ Bonus Artworks ⚠️🔞
